description:
EIM GUI: Cross-Platform ESP-IDF Installation Manager


What's Changed
- EIM-668: offline installer pipeline should now by default find run_id of the last release by @Hahihula in #646
- quick workflow fix by @Hahihula in #647
- fix calling the offline installer tests by @Hahihula in #662
- EIM-683: everything should now properly use the command executor hiding the spawning terminal windows by @Hahihula in #664
- Fixes an installation error caused by setting mtime on symbolic links (EIM-678) by @fcabralpacheco in #657
- EIM-595: CLI Tests for using existing cloned git repo to verify the installation by @alirana01 in #550
- EIM-688: arguments should be now corectly passed to gui too by @Hahihula in #671
- fix: dependency detection on windows by @Hahihula in #670
- EIM-665: remove python resrtiction on windows by @Hahihula in #643
- EIM-679: prolonged the timeout on the SSL sanity check for python to 30s by @Hahihula in #663
New Contributors
- @fcabralpacheco made their first contribution in #657
Full Changelog: v0.10.5...v0.11.0
